case_title: STITT, WILLIAM BRITTON, JR. et al VS MCCREA, SUSAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY STITT, WILLIAM BRITTON, JR. STITT, SUSAN KEENE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCREA, SUSAN TRUST U/W DOROTHY SCULLY, DECEASED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED W/RELEASE AUTHORIZA- TION LETTER.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-14-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-01-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DEFENDANT'S CO-TRUSTEE THEODORE A. KOLB, CORRESPONDENCE TO THE COURT RE TRUST AND INTENTION TO MOVE TO DISMISS FILED.
PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATION STATING THAT DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED AND REQUESTED TO RESET TRIAL DATE.
PROOF OF SERVICE (BY DEFENDANT TRUSTEES) OF LETTER FROM THE TRUST, U/W DOROTHY SCULLY, DECEASED, TO THE SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STITT, WILLIAM BRITTON, JR. STITT, SUSAN KEENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCREA, SUSAN TRUST U/W DOROTHY SCULLY, DECEASED $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO ADD "TRUST U/W DOROTHY SCULLY DECEASED" AS DEFENDANT, AND TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE DEFENDANT SUSAN MCCREA, AN INDIVIDUAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
